title: OrderSpec Framework Metadata
description: Single source of truth for framework version and schema versions. Lives at .orderspec/orderspec.json

framework_version.description: Semantic version of the OrderSpec framework

schema_versions.description: Integer versions for each schema domain. Scripts derive their version markers from these values.

frontmatter.description: Schema version for artifact frontmatter validation

artifacts.description: Schema version for artifact classification and registry

lifecycle.description: Schema version for lifecycle states and transitions

traceability.description: Schema version for traceability TSV files and markers
